questions.question: What is the primary function of the 'plt.show()' function in Matplotlib?
options: To save the plot as an image
To close the plot window
To display the plot
To delete the plot
questions.explanation: The 'plt.show()' function is used to display the plot.

questions.question: What is the difference between 'plt.plot()' and 'plt.scatter()' functions in Matplotlib?
options: 'plt.plot()' is used for categorical data and 'plt.scatter()' is used for numerical data
'plt.plot()' is used for scatter plots and 'plt.scatter()' is used for line plots
'plt.plot()' is used for numerical data and 'plt.scatter()' is used for categorical data
'plt.plot()' is used for both numerical and categorical data
questions.explanation: 'plt.plot()' is used to create line plots, while 'plt.scatter()' is used to create scatter plots.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'seaborn.set style()' function?
options: To change the color scheme of the plot
To change the font style of the plot
To change the style of the plot
To change the theme of the plot
questions.explanation: The 'seaborn.set style()' function is used to change the overall style of the plot, including the theme, color palette, and font styles.

questions.question: What is the difference between 'plt.title()' and 'plt.suptitle()' functions in Matplotlib?
options: 'plt.title()' is used to create a title for the entire figure, while 'plt.suptitle()' is used to create a title for the entire subplot
'plt.title()' is used to create a title for the subplot, while 'plt.suptitle()' is used to create a title for the entire figure
'plt.title()' is used to create a title for the entire figure, while 'plt.suptitle()' is used to create a title for the subplot
'plt.title()' is used to create a title for the subplot, while 'plt.suptitle()' is used to create a title for the entire figure
questions.explanation: 'plt.title()' is used to create a title for the entire figure, while 'plt.suptitle()' is used to create a title for the entire subplot.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'seaborn.set facecolor()' function?
options: To change the background color of the plot
To change the color of the plot
To change the transparency of the plot
To change the font style of the plot
questions.explanation: The 'seaborn.set facecolor()' function is used to change the background color of the plot.
